message.reasoning: We need to respond with only the JSON-like dict with action and graph. Start at Bar node. Edges empty initially. Directions: west. So move west. Provide graph with nodes ["Bar"] maybe also include edge after moving? The example after first move to west included edge as west empty list? Actually first example: they moved west from Living Room, graph nodes ["Living Room"], edges north,south,east,west empty arrays. They didn't include the new edge because not yet known? In subsequent step after moving to Library, they added edge west with ("Living Room","Library") after moving west. So after moving, we should include the edge we traversed. So now we are at Bar, go west to unknown room. Graph nodes currently ["Bar"], edges all empty. After moving, we will add edge west ("Bar","?") but we don't know target name yet. We could just add after moving? In example after moving to Library, they added edge west [("Living Room","Library")]. So they used known target node name after moving. So now we should move west, but we don't know target room name yet. However we need to output now: action GO: west and graph includes nodes ["Bar"] and edges maybe with west empty because unknown? But example they added after moving. So we can only include known after we move? But we are sending action now, before we know target, so graph should reflect known so far: only Bar node, no edges. So output: {"action":"GO: west","graph":{"nodes":["Bar"],"edges":{"north":[],"south":[],"east":[],"west":[]
